strengths: 20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the 15-year minimum with headroom
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective (2016–present), an open-source geo-data platform in active production use
Hands-on, current AI agent tooling work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) demonstrates practical engagement with the AI ecosystem
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and recent: no ML/AI research, no model development, no AI platform at scale — the résumé's only AI evidence is infrastructure tooling begun in 2025
No strategic advisory experience: zero evidence of advising enterprise customers, shaping product strategy, or influencing executive stakeholders across organizations
Title ceiling is Staff/Senior IC — no Principal Engineer, Distinguished Engineer, or Director-level IC experience; the role demands Director-equivalent influence and scope
response.justification: The role requires recognized, demonstrated expertise in AI — ideally an advanced degree plus shipped AI products or platforms — and the ability to advise strategic customers and shape cloud/AI direction at a Director-level IC scope. Bogdan's résumé shows broad, capable generalist engineering over 20 years and genuine entrepreneurial experience via GISCollective, both positive signals. However, the only AI work cited is agentic tooling started in April 2025, with no evidence of ML model development, AI platform ownership, published AI research, or external recognition in the AI space. Critically, there is no evidence of executive-level advisory, strategic customer engagement, or organizational influence at the scale this role demands. The experience gap on the two highest-weight competencies — AI depth and strategic leadership — is too large to bridge at the Principal/Director IC level.
